title: Evangelion Unit-04 (NTE)
wikitext: [[Evangelion Unit-04|NGE]] '''NTE''' [[Evangelion Unit-04 (Anima)|Anima]] [[Evangelion Unit-04 (Other)|Other]] [[Evangelion Unit-04 (Figures)|Figures]] {{Evangelion Rebuild Infobox | name = Evangelion Unit-04 | image = [[Image:NTE 04.png|center|300px]] | japanese = エヴァンゲリオン４号機 | model = Production Model | nation = US | organization = [[Nerv#In Rebuild of Evangelion|Nerv]] | pilots = - | upgrades = - | unique = [[S² Engine]] Testbed | debut = [[Evangelion 2.0: You Can (Not) Advance|Eva:2.0]] | status = Destroyed during activation test }} [[Image:Eva2-22_C0807.jpg|left|thumb|Eva-04 incident.]] Eva-04 served as a next generation test bed for a new internal power unit. The research was brought to an abrupt end when the Eva vaporized and took out the Second Branch with it. From space, a flaming cross can be seen rising from the epicenter, and a dark red disc with two bright red rings spreads out from the site over the earth's surface. The only confirmed data is that of an A.T. Field collapse. Once again, the Eva itself is never seen, the infobox image is from [[Evangelion Unit-04 (Other)|one of the pachinko machines]]. {{Evangelion List}} [[Category:A to Z]] [[Category:Evangelions]] [[Category:Rebuild of Evangelion]]
html:
NGE NTE Anima Other Figures

Evangelion Unit-04
エヴァンゲリオン４号機
Model Type Production Model
Nation of Origin US
Affiliation Nerv
Pilot(s) -
Unique Properties S² Engine Testbed
Upgrades/Variants -
Debut Eva:2.0
Status Destroyed during activation test


Eva-04 served as a next generation test bed for a new internal power unit. The research was brought to an abrupt end when the Eva vaporized and took out the Second Branch with it. From space, a flaming cross can be seen rising from the epicenter, and a dark red disc with two bright red rings spreads out from the site over the earth's surface. The only confirmed data is that of an A.T. Field collapse.

Once again, the Eva itself is never seen, the infobox image is from one of the pachinko machines.

From space, a flaming cross can be seen rising from the epicenter, and a dark red disc with two bright red rings spreads out from the site over the earth's surface. Once again, the Eva itself is never seen, the infobox image is from one of the pachinko machines.
